user.title: Set up E-Paper Calendar
user.description: Enter a name for this E-Paper Calendar device.

authorize_device.name: Authorize Device
authorize_device.description: Authorize a pending EPCAL device to access the calendar.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The unique ID of the device to authorize.

deny_device.name: Deny Device
deny_device.description: Deny a pending EPCAL device access to the calendar.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The unique ID of the device to deny.

revoke_device.name: Revoke Device
revoke_device.description: Revoke authorization from an EPCAL device.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The unique ID of the device to revoke.

trigger_render.name: Trigger Render
trigger_render.description: Force a manual re-render of the calendar display.
